title: A4 High Tech threshold and commodity coverage
primary_observations: Economy shares, commodity list, missing construction materials, supporting links
success_condition: Detect whether High Tech promotion materially improves whole-colony material coverage

title: Post-build station-class market differences
required_state: Comparable colony-type builds on comparable bodies

title: Refinery threshold for metals at the Dodec
primary_target: Weak Refinery support on the Dodec
required_state: Stable Dodec baseline with absent Steel Titanium Aluminium

success_condition: Identify minimum intervention that restores the missing metals

title: Local body modifier non-stacking
required_state: Bodies chosen to isolate rings organics and geological traits

success_condition: Determine whether modifiers stack, override, or remain single-application

title: Main Port routing and link aggregation
primary_target: Main surface and orbital port routing
required_state: Body with both main surface and main orbital ports plus supporting facilities

success_condition: Determine whether visible arrows aggregate upstream contributions through a main-port path
